PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS, CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIMP CAROLYN Y IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS, CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. NO JURISDICTION MATTER COMES WITHIN EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION OF WORKERS COMPENSATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
